name: Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the broccoli and wash thoroughly.
2. Split each stalk lengthwise into halves.
3. Place the onion and celery in a food processor with its chopping blade.
4. Process until coarsely chopped.
5. Combine the broccoli, onion, celery, salt, pepper, bay leaves, and first measure of nutmeg in a Dutch oven or large, heavy kettle.
6. Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
7. Cover and simmer until the broccoli is tender (about 30 minutes).
8. Drain, reserving the broth.
9. Puree the vegetables in batches with 1 cup of broth using a food processor.
10. Melt the butter in the Dutch oven.
11. Remove from heat and add the flour.
12. Stir until smooth.
13. Gradually stir in the reserved broth, cooking over medium heat until the mixture boils.
14. Add the pureed vegetables and Half & Half to the pot.
15. Continue stirring until the soup is hot and well blended (about 5 minutes).
16. Serve each bowl topped with a spoonful of whipped cream and a dash of grated nutmeg.
